description: missing_acks returns the sorted seq numbers in sent but not in acked; all_received is True only when nothing is missing; resend_count is the number of missing packets.
All acked gives [] / True / 0; none acked returns the full list / False / the full count; out-of-order acks still work and the result is sorted.
all_received and resend_count reuse missing_acks instead of re-scanning; clear names; a return on every path.
